# Lab Journal Template

Use this template for personal homelab and engineering journal entries.

This is a documentation template only. It is not part of the ElliottSecurity Platform content collections and will not be published to the website.

Copy sections as needed for internal notes, build logs, or experiment tracking.

---

## Entry Metadata

- **Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Lab Environment:** Enterprise Detection Engineering Lab
- **Focus Area:** Detection Engineering / Threat Hunting / DFIR / Automation
- **Status:** In Progress / Completed / Blocked

## Objective

Describe what you are building, testing, or investigating in this session.

## Environment

Document relevant hosts, services, versions, and configuration context.

## Work Log

### Step 1

- Action taken
- Command, config, or query used
- Result

### Step 2

- Action taken
- Result

## Observations

Capture findings, errors, performance notes, and unexpected behavior.

## Detection or Hunt Notes

Optional section for related detection ideas, hunt pivots, or ATT&CK mapping.

## Next Steps

List follow-up tasks, validation work, and documentation to publish later.

## References

- Internal docs
- Vendor documentation
- GitHub issues or commits
